basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation (GMRC) has released the official Director (Systems, Electrical & Rolling Stock) Notification 2026 on 27 April 2026 at its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the GMRC Director (Systems, Electrical & Rolling Stock) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 45 to 57 years with a qualification of Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering (Electrical / Mechanical / Electronics & Communication) can apply via email on or before 26 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 45 years Maximum Age: 57 years Age may be relaxed for exceptional candidates having higher qualifications and experience in implementation of a Metro Rail Project.

qualification.details: Director : Graduate having Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering (Electrical / Mechanical / Electronics & Communication) from a University or institute recognized by the Govt. of India or a State Government. A proven track record of Twenty Five (25) years of Group 'A' / Executive Service in Railways or equivalent, including Railway PSUs/Metro Rail Corporations/PSUs/Metro Rail or MRTS private organisations. 5 years experience out of the Twenty Five (25) years mentioned above in Metro Rail / Rolling Stock /Railway Electrification / Traction/ E&M/ Signaling & Telecommunications.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GMRC Director Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GMRC Director recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the GMRC Director (Systems, Electrical & Rolling Stock) position is 26th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authorities before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering (Electrical / Mechanical / Electronics & Communication) from a recognized university or institute. Additional experience in the relevant field is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Director post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Director (Systems, Electrical & Rolling Stock) position is between 45 years and 57 years. Age relaxation may be provided for exceptional candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 1,80,000/- to Rs. 3,40,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the GMRC Director role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Director (Systems, Electrical & Rolling Stock).

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for Deputation/Contract positions.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
